title: Help us improve our services - Canada.ca
content:
## Help us improve our services
We run usability testing regularly to improve our products. We’re looking for people who are interested in helping us test our products.

## If you get an email about testing
If you get an email from IRCC.CEUsability-UtilisabiliteEC.IRCC@cic.gc.ca inviting you to test a product with us, it’s legitimate. Go ahead and book a session!

## What usability testing is
Usability testing is a way we evaluate and improve our services. We watch participants interact with a product to find out how the product functions.
- complete different tasks using our products
- let us know how easy it was to understand what they needed to do
We use what we learn to improve our products.

## How you can participate
We’re looking for people to spend 30 to 60 minutes to try out a product, including
- other Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada products
The testing is anonymous, and your participation won’t affect any current or future applications with the department.
If you’re interested, answer a few questions and we’ll contact you with more information.
Sign up for usability testing .
